SEARCH
Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element

Interface Element

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractElement, Button, Checkbox, Circle, Gradient, Image, LabeledRect, Line, Radio, Rect, Slider, Text, Textbox
public interface Element
Represents an element.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    Element.Type
    Represents an element type.

    Modifier and Type

    getAnchor()
    Get this element's anchor position on the screen.

  • Method Details

    • getKey

      @NotNull Key getKey()
      Get identifying key.
      Returns:
      Identifying key

    • getType

      @NotNull Element.Type getType()
      Get this element's type.
      Returns:
      Type of element

    • getPos

      @Nullable Vec2 getPos()
      Get this element's position from the anchor position.

      If null, default position 0,0 will be used.

      Returns:
      Position from anchor

    • setPos

      @NotNull Element setPos(float x, float y)
      Set this element's position from the anchor position.

      If null, default position 0,0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) position
      y - Y (vertical) position
      Returns:
      This element

    • setPos

      @NotNull Element setPos(@Nullable Vec2 pos)
      Set this element's position from the anchor position.

      If null, default position 0,0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      pos - Position
      Returns:
      This element

    • getAnchor

      @Nullable Vec2 getAnchor()
      Get this element's anchor position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      Returns:
      Anchor position

    • setAnchor

      @NotNull Element setAnchor(float x, float y)
      Set this element's anchor position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) anchor
      y - Y (vertical) anchor
      Returns:
      This element

    • setAnchor

      @NotNull Element setAnchor(@Nullable Vec2 anchor)
      Set this element's anchor position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      Parameters:
      anchor - Anchor position
      Returns:
      This element

    • getOffset

      @Nullable Vec2 getOffset()
      Get this element's offset position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the element's size.

      Returns:
      Position offset

    • setOffset

      @NotNull Element setOffset(float x, float y)
      Set this element's offset position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the element's size.

      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) position offset
      y - Y (vertical) position offset
      Returns:
      This element

    • setOffset

      @NotNull Element setOffset(@Nullable Vec2 offset)
      Set this element's offset position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the element's size.

      Parameters:
      offset - Position offset
      Returns:
      This element

    • getRotation

      @Nullable Float getRotation()
      Get this element's rotation in degrees.

      If null, default rotation 0.0 will be used.

      Returns:
      Degrees of rotation

    • setRotation

      @NotNull Element setRotation(@Nullable Float degrees)
      Set this element's rotation in degrees.

      If null, default rotation 0.0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      degrees - Degrees of rotation
      Returns:
      This element

    • getScale

      @Nullable Float getScale()
      Get this element's scale.

      If null, default scale 1.0 will be used.

      Returns:
      Element's scale

    • setScale

      @NotNull Element setScale(@Nullable Float scale)
      Set this element's scale.

      If null, default scale 1.0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      scale - Element's scale
      Returns:
      This element
